all_incoming_message_objects_from_the_we: All incoming message objects from the webhook batch, flattened across entries/changes
all_message_status_objects_from_the_webh: All message status objects from the webhook batch, flattened across entries/changes
all_sender_contact_profiles_from_the_web: All sender contact profiles from the webhook batch
business_display_phone_number_from_the_f: Business display phone number from the first message or status item in the batch
business_phone_number_id_from_the_first_: Business phone number ID from the first message or status item in the batch
conversation_metadata_from_the_first_sta: Conversation metadata from the first status update in the batch (id, expiration_timestamp, origin.type)
enter_phone_number_with_country_code_e_g: Enter phone number with country code (e.g., +1234567890)
first_outgoing_message_status_in_the_bat: First outgoing message status in the batch, such as sent, delivered, or read
first_sender_contact_in_the_webhook_batc: First sender contact in the webhook batch (wa_id, profile.name)
have_whatsapp_attempt_to_render_a_link_p: Have WhatsApp attempt to render a link preview for the first URL in the message.
initial_delivery_state_returned_by_the_s: Initial delivery state returned by the send API, such as accepted or paused
integrate_whatsapp_into_the_workflow_can: Integrate WhatsApp into the workflow. Can send messages.
messaging_product_returned_by_the_send_a: Messaging product returned by the send API
notify_a_customer_over_whatsapp_about_an: Notify a customer over WhatsApp about an order status change such as shipment or delivery.
pricing_metadata_from_the_first_status_u: Pricing metadata from the first status update in the batch (billable, pricing_model, category)
recipient_contacts_returned_by_the_send_: Recipient contacts returned by the send API (each item includes input and wa_id)
recipient_phone_number_echoed_by_the_sen: Recipient phone number echoed by the send API
recipient_phone_number_from_the_first_st: Recipient phone number from the first status update in the batch
resolved_whatsapp_user_id_for_the_recipi: Resolved WhatsApp user ID for the recipient
send_a_personalized_whatsapp_message_to_: Send a personalized WhatsApp message to each contact in an audience list, one at a time.
send_a_whatsapp_message_reminding_a_cont: Send a WhatsApp message reminding a contact of an upcoming appointment or booking.
sender_phone_number_from_the_first_incom: Sender phone number from the first incoming message
text_body_from_the_first_incoming_text_m: Text body from the first incoming text message
timestamp_from_the_first_message_or_stat: Timestamp from the first message or status item in the batch
type_of_the_first_incoming_message_in_th: Type of the first incoming message in the batch, such as text, image, or system
webhook_classification_such_as_incoming_: Webhook classification such as incoming_message, message_status, or mixed
whether_to_render_a_preview_for_the_firs: Whether to render a preview for the first URL
your_whatsapp_business_api_access_token: Your WhatsApp Business API Access Token
your_whatsapp_business_phone_number_id: Your WhatsApp Business Phone Number ID
